title: Senior Staff Engineer (Full Stack — Agentic AI) | 10–14 Years | Bengaluru
company_stage: Series A/B (rapidly growing startup backed by VCs)
company_focus:
AI-driven service intelligence platform for enterprise
service decisions
description:
About Us:



Neuron7.ai is a rapidly growing AI-first SaaS company
focused on creating a category-defining service intelligence
product. Backed by top venture capitalists in Silicon Valley
and a distinguished group of angel advisors/investors, we
are recognized as a startup to watch. Our swift traction in
the market underscores our mission to empower enterprises to
make accurate service decisions at scale. Our AI-driven
platform delivers service predictions in seconds by
analyzing structured and unstructured data alongside
insights from leading experts. In complex service
environments—such as high-tech devices, manufacturing, and
medical devices—Neuron7.ai helps service leaders excel in
critical metrics like first-call resolution, turnaround
time, and service margins. Learn more at Neuron7.ai.



Why Join Us:

At Neuron7.ai, you’ll be part of a dynamic and innovative
team that is redefining service intelligence. We value
creativity, collaboration, and a commitment to pushing
boundaries.



About the Team:

As a Senior Staff Engineer at Neuron7.ai, you will play a
key leadership role in architecting, developing, and
optimizing the backend infrastructure for our cutting-edge
products. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams
to design and deliver scalable, high-performance systems
while mentoring and guiding other engineers.



What You’ll Do:

Design, implement, and maintain scalable backend systems.

Develop and optimize distributed systems capable of handling
large-scale traffic and data.

Lead the architecture and design of critical components and
systems.

Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code

Collaborate with product managers, frontend engineers, and
other stakeholders to deliver end-to-end solutions.

Ensure the backend systems are reliable, secure, and
performant.

Troubleshoot complex production issues and implement robust
solutions.

Mentor and provide technical guidance to junior and mid-
level engineers.

Stay updated on the latest technologies and trends in
backend development and distributed systems.





What We’re Looking For:

Minimum 10 years of professional experience in backend
development.

Design and build end-to-end full-stack features for AI-
native products

Architect and develop Agentic AI workflows, orchestration
layers, and AI services

Build scalable distributed systems handling large-scale data
and real-time inference

Lead architecture for multi-tenant SaaS, security, and
reliability

Develop APIs, microservices, and UI experiences powering AI
workflows

Collaborate with Product, Design, Data Science, and Customer
teams

Expertise in one of the following programming languages:
Java, Python, or Golang.

Proven experience in building and maintaining distributed
systems at scale.

Familiarity with at least one major cloud platform (Azure,
AWS, or GCP).

Strong understanding of system design, architecture
patterns, and data structures.

Experience with relational and NoSQL databases.

Proficiency in developing RESTful APIs and microservices.

Solid understanding of security best practices and
performance optimization.

Excellent problem-solving and debugging skills.

Strong communication and collaboration skills.

Preferred Skills:

Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, or other
containerization tools.

Familiarity with messaging systems like Kafka, RabbitMQ, or
similar.

Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and automation tools.

Knowledge of data pipelining frameworks such as PySpark,
Flink or similar





What We Do and Value:

At Neuron7.ai, we prioritize integrity, innovation, and a
customer-centric approach.

Our mission is to enhance service decision-making through
advanced AI technology, and we are dedicated to delivering
excellence in all aspects of our work.



Company Perks & Benefits:

💰 Competitive salary, equity, and spot bonuses.

🤕 Paid sick leave.

💻 Latest MacBook Pro for your work.

🏥 Comprehensive health insurance.

🍼 Paid parental leave.

🏡Work from our vibrant Bengaluru office-Hybrid





Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion:

Neuron7.ai is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive
workplace. We ensure equal employment opportunities without
discrimination or harassment based on race, color, religion,
sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical
conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity or
expression, age, disability, national origin, marital
status, or any other characteristic protected by law.



If you’re excited about building innovative backend
solutions and want to be part of a forward-thinking team,
we’d love to hear from you!
responsibilities: Design and build end-to-end full-stack features for AI-native products
Architect and develop Agentic AI workflows, orchestration layers, and AI services
Build scalable distributed systems handling large-scale data and real-time inference
Lead architecture for multi-tenant SaaS, security, and reliability
Develop APIs, microservices, and UI experiences powering AI workflows
Collaborate with Product, Design, Data Science, and Customer teams
Troubleshoot complex production issues and implement robust solutions
Mentor and provide technical guidance to junior and mid-level engineers
use_cases: Service intelligence and decision-making for enterprises
Service predictions by analyzing structured and unstructured data
First-call resolution optimization in complex service environments
Turnaround time improvement for high-tech devices and manufacturing
Service margin optimization for medical devices and equipment
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role explicitly requires architecting and developing
Agentic AI workflows, orchestration layers, and AI services,
as well as building full-stack features for AI-native
products. The position involves hands-on work implementing
AI systems including real-time inference, which is core
AI/ML work.
